lead: Recent developments in education highlight challenges regarding access to resources and security breaches impacting institutions worldwide.

stories.title: It Just Got Harder to Get Apple's Educational Discount
stories.summary: Apple has tightened its educational discount policy, now requiring proof of eligibility for students and educators to access the Education Store. This change aims to ensure that discounts are used appropriately but may complicate the purchasing process for many. As educational institutions increasingly rely on technology, this shift could impact affordability for students.

stories.title: Ransom ‘paid’ to hackers who crippled online learning in Australia
stories.summary: In a significant breach affecting over 120 educational institutions in Australia, hackers disrupted online learning platforms, leading to a ransom payment. The incident is noted as one of the largest in the education sector, raising concerns about cybersecurity in schools and universities. The aftermath includes questions about data security and the resilience of educational systems against cyber threats.
